top_signals.title: Gold Holds Gain as Hopes for US-Iran Truce Ease Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Gold held a gain after the latest comments from US President Donald Trump refreshed optimism that the Middle East conflict might be nearing an end, easing bets on interest-rate hikes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China sets new mining controls to fast-track strategic reserve buildout
top_signals.summary: Stricter rules including security reviews on foreign investments in the Chinese mining sector are set to take effect on June 15.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
